name: McDonald's Corporation
description: McDonald's Corporation is the world's leading global foodservice retailer, operating one of the most recognized fast-food restaurant chains. Founded in 1954 by Ray Kroc, the company has grown from a small California restaurant into a massive international enterprise with over 36,000 locations across more than 100 countries. McDonald's primarily operates through a franchise business model, where the majority of its restaurants are owned and operated by independent local business owners. The company is widely known for its iconic menu items, including burgers, fries, and chicken products, serving millions of customers daily worldwide.
